message:
The other day, I was in the kitchen trying to whip up a quick dinner while my kids were playing nearby. You know how it goes—one minute they’re building a tower with blocks, and the next, it’s a full-on wrestling match! I glanced at the stove and realized I hadn’t checked the smoke alarm in a while. Cue the classic parent moment where I had to balance being the fun parent with the responsible one. 

After a little chat with the kids about kitchen safety and why it’s important to be mindful of what’s cooking, we made a game out of checking the smoke alarm together. They took turns pressing the button and giggling when it beeped. It was a great reminder that safety can be a shared adventure, and it’s never too early to instill those habits. 

Have you had any fun moments like that with your kids when it comes to safety? This little refresher helped our family stay on track!
